articles.title: Police chief apologises to Henry Nowak's family over handcuffing and arrest
articles.description: Chief Constable Alexis Boon tells the BBC the footage of how the murder victim had been treated was distressing.

articles.title: PM accuses Farage of exploiting Nowak case and denies 'two-tier policing' claim
articles.description: It comes after the Reform UK leader said the public should respond with "pure, cold rage" to the actions of police.
